title: rubus × infrapilosus
intro: Rubus × infrapilosus, also known as the infrapilose raspberry or black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Rubus genus, characterized by its dark purple color and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × infrapilosus lie in its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including cardiovascular protection, anti-cancer properties, and anti-aging effects, due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Rubus × infrapilosus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
